whats_this.heading: Welcome to the Polio Vaccination Guide Wizard
whats_this.sub: Get your official Polio Vaccination Certificate for travel
whats_this.description: A Polio Vaccination Certificate is an official document that proves you have received the polio vaccine. It’s especially needed if you’re travelling abroad from Pakistan — many countries require it to reduce the international spread of the virus.
quick_instructions: Receive a custom roadmap and document checklist
Follow the step-by-step guide to get vaccinated and register on NIMS
whats_this.disclaimer: This wizard provides general guidance. Requirements and fees are subject to change by the government.

document_need.title: Who is getting the certificate?
document_need.description: Select the applicant's profile to determine the exact documents required at the vaccination center.

location.title: Location Information
location.description: Your current residential address helps determine the nearest vaccination centers.
location.country_note: This wizard is specifically for Pakistan vaccination centers.
location.location_note: Why location matters: Knowing your location helps us find the nearest authorized vaccination center that is linked with the NIMS system.

onlinePhases.title: Download Online
onlinePhases.description: Visit the official NIMS website and select 'Other Vaccination – Polio / Yellow Fever'. Enter your CNIC & Passport Number and Issue Date. Verify your information, pay the one-time processing fee online (≈ Rs 100). Hit Download and save the PDF securely on your phone for easy access. Online download available in selected districts; otherwise, collect physically at EPI/NIMS center

onsitePhases.title: Where to Go
onsitePhases.description: Authorized government hospitals, District Headquarter Hospitals (DHQs), and District Health Offices (DHOs) provide both the vaccine and NIMS data entry.

onsitePhases.title: Get Vaccinated
onsitePhases.description: Visit your selected vaccination center. Provide your original ID and ensure the staff correctly enters your details into the NIMS system.

onsitePhases.title: NIMS Entry
onsitePhases.description: Wait up to 24 hours for the vaccination record to reflect on the official NIMS portal. You can check your status online.

documents_checklist.label: Original Passport
documents_checklist.description: Mandatory if you are traveling abroad; ensures the certificate is linked to your passport.

documents_checklist.label: Active Mobile Number
documents_checklist.description: Used for SMS verification and NIMS portal tracking.

onlinePhases.title: Download Online
onlinePhases.description: Visit the official NIMS website and select 'Other Vaccination – Polio / Yellow Fever'. Enter the B-Form / CRC Number and Issue Date. Verify your information, pay the one-time processing fee online (≈ Rs. 100). Hit Download and save the PDF securely on your phone for easy access. Online download available in selected districts; otherwise, collect physically at EPI/NIMS center

documents_checklist.label: Original B-Form (CRC)
documents_checklist.description: Mandatory for minors. Ensure the B-Form number is correctly relayed to the operator.

documents_checklist.label: Parent's CNIC
documents_checklist.description: Original CNIC of the accompanying parent or guardian.

documents_checklist.label: Active Mobile Number
documents_checklist.description: Used for SMS verification and NIMS portal tracking.

documents_checklist.label: Passport Copy
documents_checklist.description: Important if the child is traveling abroad.

onlinePhases.title: Download Online
onlinePhases.description: Visit the official NIMS website and select 'Other Vaccination – Polio / Yellow Fever'. Enter your Passport Number and Issue Date. Verify your information, pay the one-time processing fee online (≈ Rs. 100). Hit Download and save the PDF securely on your phone for easy access. Online download available in selected districts; otherwise, collect physically at EPI/NIMS center

onsitePhases.title: Where to Go
onsitePhases.description: Authorized government hospitals, District Headquarter Hospitals (DHQs), and District Health Offices (DHOs) provide both the vaccine and NIMS data entry.

onsitePhases.title: Get Vaccinated
onsitePhases.description: Visit your selected vaccination center. Provide your original ID and ensure the staff correctly enters your details into the NIMS system.

onsitePhases.title: NIMS Entry
onsitePhases.description: Wait up to 24 hours for the vaccination record to reflect on the official NIMS portal. You can check your status online.

documents_checklist.label: Original Passport
documents_checklist.description: Primary identification document. The passport number is used for NIMS entry.

documents_checklist.label: Valid Visa Copy
documents_checklist.description: Proof of legal stay in Pakistan.

documents_checklist.label: Active Mobile Number
documents_checklist.description: Used for SMS verification and NIMS portal tracking.

validation.title: Certificate Validation
validation.description: Ensure all requirements are met to avoid rejection at the vaccination center or travel gates.

upload_section.title: Upload Your Vaccination Record
upload_section.description: Upload your Polio Vaccination Certificate to Document vault.

items.label: Check NIMS website for data reflection after vaccination
Verify phone number linked with the NIMS record matches
Credit/Debit Card enabled for online transactions

tips: Ensure you bring the original ID document associated with your profile.
Children must have their original B-Form or CRC.
pitfalls: Do not forget your original passport if traveling abroad.

tips: Your nearest vaccination center is based on your current residential address.
pitfalls: Don't assume any center can process your request — check availability.

tips: Double-check your passport number with the operator during data entry.
Wait 24 hours before trying to download the certificate from NIMS.
pitfalls: A wrong passport number entry will require a correction process.

tips: Confirm office hours before visiting; some close early on Fridays.
Keep a digital copy of your certificate on your phone.
Print a color copy of the certificate for airport immigration.
pitfalls: Traveling without the printed certificate might cause delays at the airport.
